records.ety: [Gr. <?/; <?/ self + <?/ strength, <?/ strong: cf. F. autocrate. See Hard, a.]

defs: An absolute sovereign; a monarch who holds and exercises the powers of government by claim of absolute right, not subject to restriction; as, Autocrat of all the Russias (a title of the Czar).
One who rules with undisputed sway in any company or relation; a despot.
quotes: The autocrat of the breakfast table.
